title: mentha arvensis var. angustifolia
intro: Mentha arvensis var. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved wild mint, is a variant of the mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. angustifolia include relief from digestive issues, nausea, and headaches, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
